title: onoclea discolor
intro: Onoclea discolor, also known as the golden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Onocleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Onoclea discolor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Onoclea discolor can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
